articles.title: 【佬们，来说说人活着是为了什么】
articles.excerpt: 看到有佬友发帖，聊到人生的意义是什么。 其实这个问题，我也被困扰过很久。 不是那种偶尔想一下的困扰，而是很多个安静的夜里，真的会反复问自己：人这一生，到底是在为什么而活？ 到现在为止，我能想到的答案，或许可以用两个字来概括 —— 传承。 当然，这只是我目前想到的答案。也许以后经历更多事情，我会有新的理解。 但至少现在，我觉得“传承”这两个字，真的可以解释很多问题。 只是，这里的传承，并不只是字面意义上的“传宗接代”。 它也不是简单地把姓氏、血脉、房子、存款留给下一代。 我理解的传承，更像是一种影响的延续。 佬们可以想想这一生踩过的坑、吃过的苦、想明白的事、建立起来的判断力、对世界的理解、对他人

articles.summary: 针对静态物体4D动力学生成难题，提出NeuROK，利用生成式神经方法在多种物理条件下实现真实时域形变，无需手工规则，为构建综合3D世界模型提供新范式。

articles.title: YoCausal: How Far is Video Generation from World Model? A Causality Perspective

We present YoCausal, a two-level benchmark inspired by the Violation of Expectation (VoE) paradigm from cognitive
articles.summary: 提出YoCausal基准，基于认知科学“预期违范”范式，双层次评估视频扩散模型（VDM）的因果理解能力，解决现有基准依赖合成数据导致的泛化局限。

articles.title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models
articles.excerpt: Recent video diffusion foundation models have achieved remarkable progress in high-quality video generation, yet turning them into real-time interactive video world models remains challenging. articles.summary: minWM提供全栈开源框架，涵盖数据构建、可控微调、自回归训练及少步推理，将视频扩散模型转化为实时交互世界模型，实现低延迟、可控的因果推演。

articles.title: GenClaw: Code-Driven Agentic Image Generation
articles.excerpt: Image generation models have evolved from text-conditioned pixel synthesis toward multimodal agents endowed with visual comprehension and tool invocation capabilities. Their workflow is trapped in a repetitive cycle of prompt rewriting for generation refinement, leaving them with no mechanism to directly manipulate the
articles.summary: GenClaw通过代码驱动取代传统提示重写循环，赋予智能体直接操作底层图像生成过程的能力，突破黑箱模型限制，支持精细可控的多模态生成。

articles.title: Reinforcement Learning with Robust Rubric Rewards
articles.excerpt: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is effective for deterministically checkable tasks, many vision-language tasks are partially verifiable, demanding multi-criteria supervision (e.g., perceptual details, reasoning steps, and constraints). Rubrics provide a natural interface for this fine-grained supervision, but their effectiveness depends on the execution accuracy during
articles.summary: 针对视觉语言任务中部分可验证的奖励设计难题，提出鲁棒评分奖励（R³）方法，利用评分标准提供多准则细粒度监督，提升强化学习在感知与推理任务中的效果。

articles.title: When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. We study this challenge as Contextual Belief Management (CBM): maintaining a predicted belief state aligned with formal evidence while isolating task-irrelevant noise. To make CBM measurable, we introduce BeliefTrack, a closed-world ben
articles.summary: 研究长期交互中LLM的上下文信念管理（CBM），提出BeliefTrack基准，评估模型依据证据更新状态、忽略噪声的能力，为可扩展对话系统提供理论框架。

articles.title: When Cloud Agents Meet Device Agents: Lessons from Hybrid Multi-Agent Systems
articles.excerpt: The design space of agentic AI inference spans two extremes: frontier large language models (LLMs), typically hosted in the cloud and offering strong performance across a wide range of tasks at substantially high cost, and more cost-efficient small language models (SLMs), which are amenable to on-device inference. Hybrid multi-agent systems (MASs) combining on-device and cloud models offer a promi
articles.summary: 探索混合多智能体系统（MAS），结合云端大模型与设备端小模型，通过协作路由策略平衡性能与成本，为实际部署提供设计经验与开源方案。

articles.title: LaRA: Layer-wise Representation Analysis for Detecting Data Contamination in RL Post-Training
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, there has been little exploration on the problem of data contamination in RL post-training, potentially undermining generalization and evaluation reliability of the training process itself. Existing detection methods primarily rely on output-level signals such as likelihood or entropy
articles.summary: LaRA通过逐层表示分析检测RL后训练中的数据污染，无需输出级信号，揭示污染对泛化与评估可靠性的影响，提升训练过程安全性。

articles.title: AgentDoG 1.5: A Lightweight and Scalable Alignment Framework for AI Agent Safety and Security
articles.excerpt: Modern open-world agents such as OpenClaw exhibit powerful cross-environment execution capabilities yet introduce broad new safety risk sources. Meanwhile, advanced frontier AI models drastically lower attack barriers, rendering current agent alignment frameworks inadequate for real-world deployment. To tackle these emerging threats, we propose a lightweight and scalable agent safety alignment fra
articles.summary: AgentDoG 1.5提出轻量可扩展的智能体安全对齐框架，针对开放世界代理（如OpenClaw）的跨环境执行风险，提供系统化防御方案，降低攻击面。

articles.title: TRACE: Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements for LLM CoT Evaluation
articles.excerpt: Evaluating open-ended outputs from large language models (LLMs) remains challenging due to the absence of ground truth. Existing metrics rely on final-answer accuracy or surface-level statistics, leaving the reasoning process itself unexamined. We introduce TRACE (Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements), a metric that analyzes Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning processes. R
articles.summary: TRACE基于Toulmin论证模型分析LLM的CoT推理过程，从构建要素维度评估推理质量，弥补现有指标仅看最终答案或表面统计的不足。

articles.title: Verifiable Rewards Beyond Math and Code: Lightweight Corpus-Grounded Process Supervision for Factual Question Answering
